creator: dennypage@me.com
text:
I don't believe the removal of sockdebug from the packing list is directly related to the --with-dev option.

The regular nut port does not have sockdebug in the packing list. This patch removes sockdebug from the nut-devel packing list, which results in it matching the content of the packing list from the regular nut port.

FWIW, I am all in favor of making the --with-dev option conditional in both nut and nut-devel, but that won't completely address the issue.
